case_title: SIM & YOON CORPORATION VS. HUSH COFFEE BAR 1 INC. ET AL

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS STILL IN BAD HEALTH. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL WITH A CONTINUANCE FEE OF $60.00 TO BE PAID IN ROOM 103. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MR. NEWDORF REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE DUE TO DEFENDANT COUNSEL'S HEALTH CONDITION. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO 9/30/19 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: ANDREW CHENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-06-2020 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON MAR-09-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. DAVID B. NEWDORF, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO PARTIES' STIPULATION. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF, ROBERT EPSTEIN, ESQ. WHO IS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS HAS SERIOUS MEDICAL PROBLEMS BUT HE HAS BEEN PARTICIPATING IN SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. THE COURT GRANTS THE CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE WITH THE CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF PAYS THE FILING FEE OF $60.00 IN ROOM 103. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/6/20 IS CONTINUED TO 3/9/20 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. STIPULATION AND ORDER TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
